channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Platner supporter Khanna calls Senate hopeful's past relationships 'toxic,' but says he deserves 'redemption'
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna described Graham Platner's past relationships as 'toxic and volatile' but said the Senate candidate is taking responsibility for his actions.

item.title: Former Indiana Rep Stephen Buyer receives full pardon from Trump for 2023 insider trading conviction
item.description: President Donald Trump granted a full pardon to former Rep. Stephen Buyer, clearing his 2023 insider trading conviction that led to a 22-month prison...

item.title: The Latest Update on Dennis Prager
Democrat Xavier Becerra Advances in Calif. Gov Race
item.description: Democrat Xavier Becerra advanced to the general election for California governor on Friday after presenting himself as an experienced candidate to lead the na...
